architecture_amendment_rule: A downstream change requires a reviewed amendment naming superseded rules and preserving audit history.

decisions.title: Layer and dependency direction
decisions.decision: Freeze domain, runtime, persistence, adapters, routes, projections, and web as separate layers. Domain remains pure; runtime orchestrates ports; persistence owns SQL and transactions; routes own auth/scope/validation; web remains read-only runtime presentation.
invariants: routes do not own generated-object writes
web cannot write generated runtime objects

decisions.title: Shared runtime core and mode adapters
decisions.decision: Replay, Shadow-online, Controlled Field, and future Production share one semantic core. Only clock, ingress, scheduler, execution feedback, availability, and deployment vary through adapters.
invariants: same inputs and config yield same semantic payload in every mode
Replay uses explicit time and no-future-leakage
Shadow-online has no AO-ACT creation authority

decisions.title: Canonical persistence and envelope profiles
decisions.decision: Postgres facts remain the only canonical append-only store. Every object declares record_class, history_class compatibility alias, lineage_member, envelope_profile, and transaction_families. LINEAGE requires lineage_id/revision_id; NON_LINEAGE_CONTEXT does not.
invariants: record_class does not imply lineage membership
non-lineage audit may exist before bootstrap

decisions.title: State object granularity and atomicity
decisions.decision: A valid State advance atomically appends transition, assimilation update, and posterior State. The propagated prior is not current State; the posterior is canonical State.
invariants: prior is not canonical current State
sensor reading is Evidence, never direct State

decisions.title: Tick claim, compute, and outcome transactions
decisions.decision: A tick has Claim, Compute, and Commit. A1 COMPLETED and A2 BLOCKED Forecast outcomes may commit State and checkpoint. Forecast FAILED is operational transaction F and creates no terminal tick or checkpoint.
invariants: A2 BLOCKED has zero-point Forecast and COMPLETED_WITH_LIMITATIONS tick
FAILED creates no canonical tick or checkpoint

decisions.title: Checkpoint, lease, fencing, restart, and backfill
decisions.decision: Each scope has one fenced writer. Successful A1/A2 ticks append checkpoint and CAS latest. Failed attempt or failed Forecast leaves checkpoint unchanged. Restart backfills sequentially.

decisions.title: Idempotency and deterministic identity
decisions.decision: Every semantic object has object_id, idempotency_key, and determinism_hash. Lineage and revision participate only when lineage_member=true. fact_id and audit timestamps are excluded.
invariants: same semantic work produces same identity/hash

decisions.title: Late Evidence and revision lifecycle
decisions.decision: Late Evidence creates a revision run and candidate lineage through E1, appends progress/terminal status through E2, and promotes only through E3 after complete chain validation. Promotion appends authority and atomically switches active pointers.

decisions.title: Forecast result and failure separation
decisions.decision: twin_forecast_run_v1 permits COMPLETED with exactly 72 points or BLOCKED with zero points and reason_codes. FAILED is forbidden on the lineage Forecast object and uses non-lineage twin_forecast_failure_v1 in transaction F.
invariants: COMPLETED advances checkpoint and successful Forecast index
BLOCKED advances checkpoint but not successful Forecast index
FAILED advances neither tick nor checkpoint
t0 is not a Forecast point

decisions.title: Scenario source eligibility
decisions.decision: Scenario is a separate atomic aggregate and may use only a committed COMPLETED Forecast with exactly 72 points and horizons 1..72. BLOCKED and FAILED outcomes are ineligible.

decisions.title: Residual and calibration separation
decisions.decision: Assimilation residual belongs to the current update. Forecast residual compares later Evidence with a historical COMPLETED Forecast point and never mutates the Forecast.
invariants: forecast residual does not mutate Forecast

decisions.title: Model/config binding and activation
decisions.decision: Each tick resolves one immutable config before compute. Candidate, shadow evaluation, approval, and activation are separate append-only transitions. Activation changes only at a tick boundary.

decisions.title: Read API and human write API separation
decisions.decision: Runtime Operator APIs remain read-only under the field-scoped family. Generated objects have no public write endpoint. Human decision and action writes remain separately governed.
invariants: manual tick begins as application service/runner/scheduler adapter

decisions.title: Legacy compatibility and migration
decisions.decision: Legacy paths remain read-only compatibility surfaces with no new MCFT capability or dual canonical write. Deletion requires caller migration and explicit approval.
invariants: legacy paths gain no new capability

decisions.title: Runtime security and write authority
decisions.decision: Write authority is object-specific. Runtime Orchestrator writes State/Tick/Forecast outcomes; Forecast failure uses operational audit; Revision Service owns E1/E2; Promotion Service owns E3; Action Feedback Service may normalize trustworthy executed Evidence before formal Acceptance.
invariants: Acceptance is not prerequisite for all executed Evidence

decisions.title: Runtime health and claim boundaries
decisions.decision: Attempt, Health, and Forecast failure are non-lineage operational audit. They may exist before active lineage or checkpoint. Blocked/failed attempts do not become State history.
invariants: stale writer cannot report committed success
